repo.name: checkout-svc
repo.description: Payment + checkout service for the Donutworks storefront.

signals.label: no test files detected by pattern
no AI code-review or auto-fix/auto-PR workflows
main is protected; requires PR + 1 approval
3 of 5 GitHub Actions unpinned (use @v4 tags, not SHAs)

commitSample: feat(checkout): add idempotency key to charge endpoint
fix(webhook): verify Stripe signature before parsing body
refactor: extract money math into cents.ts

files.content:
name: ci
on: [push, pull_request]
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
      - run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
      - run: pnpm build
      - run: pnpm lint

# Agent notes
This is a payment service. Be careful with money math — always integer cents.
Run `pnpm test` before pushing. Stripe webhooks must verify signatures.

# checkout-svc
Payment + checkout for Donutworks. Stripe-backed. Express + Zod validation.
## Setup
pnpm install && pnpm dev
## Testing
pnpm test (vitest)
## Deploy
Manual: build a container, push to ECR, update the ECS service. (No release automation yet.)
